summary: Testing of circular session card redesign in Gates and Prayer Areas Daily Logs. Both pages display circular session cards correctly with: day number (large, bold), day name (small text below), color-coded borders (amber for drafts), hover tooltips, delete buttons on hover, and active state with ring/scale/glow animation. Grid layout (5 columns) is implemented. All sessions found are currently drafts (amber color). Blue (Gates) and emerald (Prayer Areas) colors will display for completed sessions.

gates_daily_log.circle_day_name: PASS - Day name 'ثلاثاء' (Tuesday) displayed below in small text
gates_daily_log.circle_styling: PASS - rounded-full, border, gradient classes applied
gates_daily_log.amber_draft_color: PASS - Amber border/gradient for draft session
gates_daily_log.hover_tooltip: PASS - Dark tooltip (bg-slate-900) visible on hover
gates_daily_log.hover_delete_button: PASS - Delete button visible on hover with data-testid='delete-session-{id}'

prayer_areas_daily_log.amber_draft_color: PASS - Amber color for draft session (no completed sessions to verify emerald)

critical_code_review_comments: ArchiveSidebar.jsx (Gates): Circular session grid implemented at lines 242-340 with proper styling
ArchiveSessionSidebar.jsx (Prayer Areas): Matching circular design at lines 222-340
Both components use consistent data-testid attributes: session-circle-{id}, delete-session-{id}
fadeInUp animation in index.css at line 135-138 provides smooth entry animation with staggered delays
Color coding correct: blue-400/500 for Gates completed, emerald-400/500 for Prayer Areas completed, amber-400/500 for drafts
Active state includes: ring-[3px], ring-offset-2, shadow-lg, scale-110, and animate-ping glow
Tooltip shows date, status (مكتمل/مسودة), and changes summary with proper Arabic text
Delete button positioned at bottom center, appears on group-hover with red-500 background

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All circular session card features verified working

seed_data_creation: Tested with existing session data - Gates: session-circle-9743564e-b36d-432f-8bf8-fe794b84ccab (Mar 3), Prayer Areas: session-circle-9555d21a-da4a-4ffb-877f-e6e279a748f9
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested circular session card redesign. Routes: /daily-gates for Gates Daily Log, /daily-sessions for Prayer Areas Daily Log. Key data-testids: archive-sidebar, session-circle-{id}, delete-session-{id}, calendar-day-{num}. Circles display: day number (font-extrabold), day name (font-semibold text-[7px]). Colors: amber for draft, blue for Gates completed, emerald for Prayer Areas completed. Active state: ring, scale-110, shadow-lg, animate-ping. Grid: 5 columns. Current sessions are all drafts (amber color). To test completed session colors, create a completed session.
